name: automacaoappium

scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.test:compact: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=compact npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.test:standard: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=standard npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.test:large: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=large npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.test:debug: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=standard npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false --inspect
scripts.test:physical: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=physical npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.baseline:update: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= VISUAL_UPDATE=true npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false
scripts.report: npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.test:faq: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=physical npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false --spec test/specs/functional/faq.functional.spec.js
scripts.test:faq:responsive: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= DEVICE_FILTER=physical npx wdio run wdio.conf.js --autoCompileOpts.autoCompile=false --spec test/specs/responsiveness/faq.responsive.spec.js

description: Automação mobile WDIO + Appium — testes de responsividade para app Flutter Cresol
